name: convert_image
description: Converts images between various formats using ImageMagick. Supports all major image formats including PNG, JPEG, WEBP, HEIC, TIFF, BMP, and GIF. This tool preserves image quality by default (95% for lossy formats) unless a specific quality level is requested. It can convert HEIC photos (from iPhones) to web-friendly formats like WEBP and PNG. The tool requires ImageMagick to be installed on the system.

src.description: Path to the source image file to be converted. Both absolute and relative paths are supported.

dst.description: Path where the converted image should be saved. The destination format is determined by the file extension (e.g., .png, .jpg, .webp).

quality.description: Optional quality setting for lossy formats like JPEG and WEBP. Range is 1-100, where 100 is highest quality. Default is 95 for high quality.

resize.description: Optional resizing dimensions using ImageMagick syntax, e.g., '800x600', '50%', or '800x600>'. The '>' operator only shrinks images larger than the specified dimensions.
